specializations: Plant stem cell actives for hair
product_highlights: PhytoCellTec™ — plant stem cell technology for scalp and hair follicle vitality
AnaGain™ — pea shoot extract stimulating hair growth signalling
Clinically validated actives with strong scientific documentation
notes: Mibelle Biochemistry is a Swiss cosmetic ingredient supplier renowned for its innovative, science-backed actives. Their PhytoCellTec™ technology platform uses plant stem cell cultures to deliver clinically proven benefits for skin and hair. AnaGain™, derived from organic pea shoots, stimulates specific growth factors in the hair follicle to reactivate hair growth and reduce hair loss. Mibelle's hair care actives focus on scalp vitality, hair follicle stimulation, and hair fiber strengthening through plant-derived biotechnology.
